# Code of Conduct

The governance of this project is simple and based on common sense.

## 1. Don't be an asshole.
No one likes them. If you are an asshole, you will be removed from the project and community. This includes being rude, entitled, or intentionally disruptive.

## 2. Be friendly and respectful.
We want this to be a productive environment. Please be friendly while making contributions or asking for help. Treat others with the same respect you expect to receive.

## 3. Adult Responsibility.
We are all adults here. You are responsible for your own behavior. We don't have the time or interest to micromanage social interactions or play "mother." If you can't behave professionally, you're not welcome.

## 4. No Entitlement.
You have no right to anything - not to have your PR merged, not to have your issue fixed immediately, and not to receive support. Everything provided here is the result of voluntary effort. Gratitude goes a long way; entitlement gets you nowhere.

## 5. Meritocracy.
Contributions are judged on their merit. High-quality code, useful bug reports, and helpful documentation are what matter most. Personal characteristics (race, gender, religion, etc.) have no bearing on the value of your work and discrimination has no place here.

## 6. Illegal Acts.
Don't do anything illegal. We defer to the governing laws of our respective jurisdictions.

---

*This Code of Conduct is a modified version of the "No Code of Conduct" (v1.0.0), tailored for NexusBot.NET.*
